title: Wynncraft Origin
description: Good Wynncraft Modpack. Only the essentials you need. Performance is the top priority
body:
This modpack is designed to enhance your Wynncraft experience. You have great enhancements like a map of Wynncraft or see the lootpool of raids or lootruns.
Great other features like Customize Hotkey or Speels button.
The shader makes minecraft even more beautiful.
The modpack is designed to be performance savvy.
> Performance > Quality.

**The most important mods are available.**
- Wynntils
- Wynnventory
- WynnBuild
- Sodium
- Iris
- ShoulderSurfing
- Zoom
- Borderless Fullscreen

### Important Hotkey Deafult:
- B -> Set new Waypoint
- C -> Zoom
- F -> Skip cutscene (in Raids)
- G -> Gammabrigth
- H -> Lock Slot
- J -> Open Guild Map
- M -> Open Map
- N -> Open WynnVentory (See Lootrun/Raid Pools)
- O -> Open Party Menu (easier for Invite Friends in Party)
- P -> Open Guild Bank
- R -> Mount Horse
- F3 -> Share Items (Hover over item)
- F4 -> Take Screenshot of Item (Hover over item)
- F12 -> Toggle Fullscreen Windowed (For users who play in windowed mode but still want the full screen size)

### Little Tips: 
Change you´re "Drop Selected Item" Other key or Notbound to use "Q" as Speel key or other Features.

Unbound Button "Toggle Tooltips" & "Toggle tooltips for boxed Items" from WynnVentory, because if your write text in Chat is Trigger also.

Use "Open Skill Point Loadouts" if you have not Champion to buy Build Stand. There you can save and load items from builds as well as skill points used.

Use Custom Commands in Wynntils (Open Conten boock -> Wynntils Menu -> Setting) and set Keybind in "Key Binds" Option.  As Example set in 1st Custom Command "class" and keybind as "C".
If youre Press "C" youre going to class-menu. However, you need the appropriate rank to be able to execute the commands.
